_comment: Seed facts for the cross-run facts cache. Copy this to /workspaces/cross_run_facts.json inside a worker container (or mount it there via a volume) to enable the facts-block injection into landscape_scan. Edit freely — every workflow created after a change picks up the new file at creation time. Consumed by app/services/facts_cache.py::load_facts.

regulatory_events.name: Illinois 1/1/2026 nexus amnesty window close
regulatory_events.impact: dated regulatory buying moment for state-nexus monitoring tools aimed at CPAs

regulatory_events.name: FSMA 204 compliance deadline, January 2026
regulatory_events.impact: FDA food traceability forced-buy moment for mid-market food processors

regulatory_events.name: EU AI Act Article 15 enforcement DELAYED to December 2027
regulatory_events.impact: kills urgency on EU AI compliance automation plays; ServiceNow and IBM already ship GA compliance products

regulatory_events.name: Shopify B2B GA rollout to non-Plus merchants
regulatory_events.impact: 200K+ merchants get native B2B primitives for the first time — window for AR/net-terms tooling on top

regulatory_events.name: FinCEN Corporate Transparency Act (BOI reporting) churn 2024-2025
regulatory_events.impact: LLC entity owners face repeated enact/pause/re-enact cycles; every small accounting firm has clients needing to file

incumbent_moves.event: Agentic AI launch + May 2025 bank-feed takeover
incumbent_moves.impact: kills 'AI bookkeeping wrapper' plays built on QBO feature surface within 18 months
same as Intuit on the Xero side
consolidates OTel trace tooling; neutrality plays face faster closure

incumbent_moves.event: SmartScan + Automated Answers (Oct 2025) + Sept 2025 portal extension
incumbent_moves.impact: horizontal RFP incumbent actively expanding into ESG/compliance verticals; 12-18 month response window

incumbent_moves.event: $100M Series D earmarked for AI-generated code rules
incumbent_moves.impact: kills standalone 'agent-slop linter' plays within 2 quarters unless defensibility moat exists

incumbent_moves.event: Supplier Catalogue pulling US suppliers in free

funded_competitors.name: Assent
funded_competitors.impact: could launch mid-market ERP-connector tier at $25K+ to defend

funded_competitors.name: Sayari
funded_competitors.vertical: screening/sanctions; has capacity to drop into mid-market API any quarter

funded_competitors.name: Resolve Pay / Slope / Billd
funded_competitors.vertical: B2B net terms on Shopify merchants (financing-first, could add workflow free)

funded_competitors.name: Xendoo + Infinite
funded_competitors.vertical: scaled catch-up bookkeeping delivery — price floor competitors can't match

dead_playbooks.pattern: thin AI wrapper over QuickBooks Online
dead_playbooks.reason: Intuit Agentic AI July 2025 absorbs anything feature-level

dead_playbooks.pattern: thin AI wrapper over Shopify Cart Transform
dead_playbooks.reason: architectural impossibility — Cart Transform functions can't do what the idea needed
enforcement delayed to Dec 2027 by EU Parliament

dead_playbooks.pattern: ML dev tools that depend on one vendor's SDK
dead_playbooks.reason: Datadog/AMD/HuggingFace shipped native integrations within 3 months of landscape
Loopio + Assent + Sphera already dominate the buyer ICP; supplier-side inversion is the wedge
Compulife v. Newman precedent; MSAs violated
Bench Dec 2024 collapse + Botkeeper Feb 2026 confirm the model dies
